scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w cedarrose-opshub-web" "npm run dev -w cedarrose-opshub-api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w cedarrose-opshub-api && npm run build -w cedarrose-opshub-web
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w cedarrose-opshub-api && npm run build -w cedarrose-opshub-web
